Tooltip_MPBrassard:
Standard Issue Brassard for members of the 223rd Military Police Battalion,
a unit responsible for law enforcement, security, and detainee operations within the KYNG.
Tooltip_EngineerArmband:
Identifier for members of the 201st Engineer Battalion,
a unit specializing in engineering support and construction in the KYNG.
Tooltip_MedicArmband:
Identifier for members of the 917th Medical Company of the 201st Engineer Battalion,
a unit specializing in combat medical support and casualty evacuation in the KYNG.
Tooltip_SupportArmband:
Identifier for members of the 41st Civil Support Team,
a unit specializing in responding to chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear incidents in the KYNG.
